message:
🐛 Fix RBAC N+1 query and increase frontend timeout (#183)

Backend: Replace per-ServiceAccount role lookups (2 K8s API calls each)
with a single batch fetch of all RoleBindings and ClusterRoleBindings,
reducing response time from ~44s to <1s for clusters with many SAs.

Frontend: Increase RBAC API call timeout from 5s to 60s to handle
larger clusters without silently falling back to empty data.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
